title: Long-Smoked Slovakian Vanilla Bake
description: A unique and deliciously smoky dessert featuring vanilla and a satisfying crunch from toasted almonds.

ingredients.name: almond milk
ingredients.notes: or soy milk for a creamier texture

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: use real vanilla beans for a more intense flavor

ingredients.name: active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: use instant yeast for a faster rise

ingredients.name: coconut sugar
ingredients.notes: use regular sugar for a sweeter flavor

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: use vegan butter for a dairy-free option

ingredients.name: large eggs
ingredients.notes: use flax or chia eggs for a vegan option

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: use brown sugar for a richer flavor

ingredients.name: wood chips for smoking
ingredients.notes: use apple or cherry wood for a fruity flavor

instructions: Mix the flour, yeast, and sugar in a large bowl.
Add the almond milk, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Place the dough on a wooden board and shape it into a round loaf.
Smoke the loaf for 2 hours, or until it's lightly browned and fragrant.
Brush the loaf with melted butter and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Bake the loaf in the oven for 20 minutes, or until it's golden brown.
Let the loaf cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
